text:
iPubmed: Interactive Fuzzy Search on Medline
The goal of the iPumbed project is to make it easier to search for publications on MEDLINE database.  It has the following features:
Instant search on title, author, journal, MeSH heading, affiliation, and abstract
Error-tolerant search engine
Updates data from NIH daily
Includes references supplied by publishers.
Major UCI Contributors:
Inci Cetindil (Ph.D. Student)
Jamshid Esmaelnezhad (PhD Student)
Shengyue Ji (PhD student)
Taewoo Kim (PhD Student)
Chen Li (Faculty)
The project was officially ended in 2014.
